serverInfo.name: kopern
serverInfo.title: Kopern — AI Agent Builder, Grader & Orchestrator
serverInfo.description: Full AI agent lifecycle via MCP: create agents, deploy from 37 templates, grade with test suites, optimize with AutoTune, orchestrate multi-agent teams, and deploy to Widget/Telegram/WhatsApp/Slack/Webhooks — 19 tools.

authentication.instructions: Create an API key at kopern.ai → Settings → Personal API Key (user-level, all platform tools) or Agent → MCP/API tab (agent-bound, adds chat). Keys start with 'kpn_'. Pass via Authorization: Bearer kpn_...

tools.name: kopern_chat
tools.description: Send a message to an agent and get a response with tool calling (agent-bound key only).

tools.name: kopern_agent_info
tools.description: Get agent metadata (agent-bound key only).

tools.name: kopern_list_templates
tools.description: List all 37 agent templates (28 general + 9 vertical). No LLM cost.

tools.name: kopern_list_agents
tools.description: List all your agents. No LLM cost.

tools.name: kopern_grade_prompt
tools.description: Grade a system prompt against inline test cases (6 criteria types). Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_create_agent
tools.description: Create a new agent with system prompt, model, and optional skills.

tools.name: kopern_get_agent
tools.description: Get full agent details (prompt, model, counts).

tools.name: kopern_update_agent
tools.description: Update agent configuration (prompt, model, tools, etc.).

tools.name: kopern_delete_agent
tools.description: Permanently delete an agent and all its data.

tools.name: kopern_deploy_template
tools.description: Deploy agent from a template with skills, tools, and grading suite in one shot.

tools.name: kopern_create_grading_suite
tools.description: Create a grading suite with test cases on an agent.

tools.name: kopern_run_grading
tools.description: Run a grading suite and get detailed scores per case. Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_run_autoresearch
tools.description: Run AutoTune to iteratively optimize an agent's system prompt. Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_create_team
tools.description: Create a multi-agent team (parallel, sequential, or conditional).

tools.name: kopern_run_team
tools.description: Execute a team on a prompt. Uses your API keys.

tools.name: kopern_connect_widget
tools.description: Enable embeddable chat widget. Returns embed code.

tools.name: kopern_connect_telegram
tools.description: Connect agent to Telegram bot.

tools.name: kopern_connect_whatsapp
tools.description: Connect agent to WhatsApp Business.

tools.name: kopern_connect_slack
tools.description: Get Slack OAuth install URL.

tools.name: kopern_connect_webhook
tools.description: Create inbound/outbound webhook (n8n, Zapier, Make compatible).
